text_body.plain_text: Executive Summary / Supplier TAM and SAM

runs.text: Outsourcing Ceiling | The maximum supplier share is built from the must-stay core and a material pass-through dial.

text_body.plain_text: Outsourcing Ceiling | The maximum supplier share is built from the must-stay core and a material pass-through dial.

runs.text: No budget line splits must-stay assembly from outsourceable work.
Published place-of-performance (POP) sets today's floor, so the ceiling is built from Basic Construction, labor share, movable hours, and material pass-through.

text_body.plain_text: No budget line splits must-stay assembly from outsourceable work. Published place-of-performance (POP) sets today's floor, so the ceiling is built from Basic Construction, labor share, movable hours, and material pass-through.

1.  Addressable base
FY22–27 Basic Construction
Excludes GFE and non-BC cost

2.  Labor mechanics
h = movable labor-hour share
L = labor share of BC

3.  Must-stay core
Core = L × (1 − h)
Final assembly, integration, test

4.  Structural ceiling
Ceiling = 1 − core
Maximum outsourceable share

runs.text: Dollarized supplier share = hL + p(1 − L)
p sets how much non-labor material travels with outsourced packages.

text_body.plain_text:
Dollarized supplier share = hL + p(1 − L)
p sets how much non-labor material travels with outsourced packages.

runs.text: Each input is sourced, derived, or an explicit assumption.

text_body.plain_text: Key levers and basis. Each input is sourced, derived, or an explicit assumption.

runs.text: Sourced total-cost anchor, rebased to BC

text_body.plain_text: Sourced total-cost anchor, rebased to BC

runs.text: L starts from a total-cost labor anchor and is rebased to Basic Construction. p moves the dollarized supplier share, so the estimate is read as a range, not a single point.

text_body.plain_text: L starts from a total-cost labor anchor and is rebased to Basic Construction. p moves the dollarized supplier share, so the estimate is read as a range, not a single point.

runs.text: p = 100% is the upper bound; p = 50% is the working case

text_body.plain_text: p = 100% is the upper bound; p = 50% is the working case

runs.text: DDG-51 h and L are explicit assumptions

text_body.plain_text: DDG-51 h and L are explicit assumptions

runs.text: POP sets today's floor, not the ceiling

text_body.plain_text: POP sets today's floor, not the ceiling

runs.text: Sources: Defense News, "Defense firms outsource sub, carrier construction amid labor woes" (M. Eckstein, Oct 2022); O'Rourke (CRS), State of U.S. Shipbuilding, House Armed Services Committee testimony (Mar 2025), cross-checked against the CBO Shipbuilding Composite Index (Apr 2024); DoD FMR 7000.14-R Vol 2B Ch 4, Exhibit P-5 ship cost element categories (Nov 2017); DoD contract award announcements (announced place-of-performance): Virginia Block V (2019), Columbia Build I (2020), DDG-51 FY23–27 multiyear (2023)

Eckstein, Oct 2022); O'Rourke (CRS), State of U.S. Shipbuilding, House Armed Services Committee testimony (Mar 2025), cross-checked against the CBO Shipbuilding Composite Index (Apr 2024); DoD FMR 7000.14-R Vol 2B Ch 4, Exhibit P-5 ship cost element categories (Nov 2017); DoD contract award announcements (announced place-of-performance): Virginia Block V (2019), Columbia Build I (2020), DDG-51 FY23–27 multiyear (2023)
